name: Encompass
description_short: Unable to verify company details—website blocked by security verification. Cannot confirm Encompass operates as a payday alternative lender.
description_long: Encompass is listed in CreditDoc's payday-alternatives category, suggesting it operates as a credit union PAL, CDFI, employer advance program, or similar sub-36% APR lending product. However, the company's website (https://encompass.com/) is currently inaccessible due to Cloudflare security verification, which prevents direct verification of their actual services, lending terms, APR caps, loan amounts, eligibility requirements, or application process. Without access to primary source material, claims about Encompass's specific products, rates, or business model cannot be independently confirmed. The security wall may indicate either a legitimate bot-protection measure or a sign of website infrastructure issues. CreditDoc researchers should attempt to access the website through alternative methods (VPN, different devices) or contact Encompass directly via phone or email to confirm their current business status and verify whether they remain an active lender in the payday-alternatives space. Given the access barrier, this profile should be flagged for manual review and direct company contact before publication.
services: Personal loans (typically lower rates than banks)
pros: Not-for-profit — typically lower fees and better rates than banks

cons: Website blocked by security verification—unable to confirm company is currently operational
